creator: dindin@yandex-team.ru
text:
Thank you for your problem report, I'll try to integrate
openssh-5.2p1-gsskex-all-20090726 patch into port as soon as possible.

Mon, Jul 27, 2009 at 21:20 +0000 Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of security/openssh-portable,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/137192 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/137192
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

-- 
Cheers
Denis Barov
